title: Forensic Information Databases annual report 2024 to 2025
body: "The report highlights the continued value of fingerprints and DNA in solving crimes and the part these biometrics play in bringing offenders to justice, keeping the public safe and preventing harm to potential future victims.  The aim of the strategy board is to provide governance and oversight for the operation of the national DNA and fingerprint databases.   We are aware of accessibility issues with these publications. We are working to fix these.  Read more about our accessible documents policy  "
